title: 願上帝保佑唐納德·特朗普-歷史上最不被讚賞的總統。

replies.msg:
Let me be clear, I am not a Biden fan at all. He is corrupt, a liar, suffering from dementia and in my opinion a pedophile. He has done nothing to improve anything in 47/48 years in politics.
讓我聲明一點：我不是拜登的粉絲。 他不單止腐敗，撒謊，而且患有老人癡呆症，我更認為他是有戀童癖的。 在47-48年的政治生涯中，他沒有做過任何改善美國的事情。
I truly believe Biden is just the stepping stone for Kamala Harris to take over the White House. Nancy Pelosi is already trying to put the 25th amendment in place to remove an unfit president. I don’t believe that has a thing to do with Trump having Covid. I think that’s to remove Biden if elected for dementia and Harris to take over.
我堅信拜登只是賀錦麗（Kamala Harris）接管白宮的墊腳石。 南施·佩洛西（Nancy Pelosi）已經嘗試提出第25號修正案，以”不合適”為理由罷免在任總統。我並不覺得這是針對患過新冠狀病毒的特朗普總統繼續執政，因為他頭腦依然清晰。這行動分明是準備患有老人癡呆症的拜登一旦當選總統，以賀錦麗來接替拜登作準備.
This is my opinion so don’t bother to bash it, I haven’t bashed yours.
這是我的觀點，我尊重你們的觀點，所以請你也尊重我的觀點。
The clown in the White House just brokered two Middle East Peace Accords, something that 71 years of political intervention and endless war failed to produce. The buffoon in the White House is the first president that has not engaged us in a foreign war since Eisenhower.
特朗普剛剛促成達成了兩項中東和平協議，這協議停止了71年的政治干預及無休止的戰爭。自艾森豪威爾（Eisenhower）以來，他是第一位沒有與我們進行外交戰爭的總統。
The clown in the White House has had the greatest impact on the economy, bringing jobs, and lowering unemployment to the Black and Latino population of ANY other president, ever.
另一方面，特朗普對經濟產生了最大的影響，那就是帶來了就業機會，並降低了非洲裔和拉丁美洲裔的失業率。 這是其他任何總統的沒有做到的。
The buffoon in the White House has exposed the deep, widespread, and long-standing corruption in the FBI, the CIA, the NSA, and the Republican and Democratic parties.
這位“白宮的醜角”暴露了聯邦調查局FBI，中情局CIA，美國國家安全局NSA以及共和黨和民主黨的深入，廣泛和長期的腐敗。
The buffoon in the White House turned NATO around and had them start paying their dues.
卻就是這位”白宮的醜角”令到北大西洋公約組織NATO態度180度反轉，逼令他們重新繳納欠款及費用。

The clown in the White House neutralized the North Koreans, stopped them from developing a further nuclear capability, sending missiles toward Japan, and threatening the West Coast of the US.
特朗普更化解北韓自六方會談之後多年與西方的核危機，令北韓自行停止進一步發展核子軍備, 不再向日本發射導彈，與威脅美國的西海岸。
The clown in the White House turned our relationship with the Chinese around, brought hundreds of business back to the US, and revived the economy. Hello!!!!!!!
特朗普重新訂定美國與中國的關係，將數以百計企搬回美國，並因此振興了經濟。 各位見到嗎！！！！
The clown in the White House has accomplished the appointing of three Supreme Court Justices and close to 300 Federal Judges.
特朗普也完成了三名最高法院大法官和近300名聯邦法官的任命。
This same clown in the White House lowered your taxes, increased the standard deduction on your IRS return from $12,500 for Married Filing Joint to $24,400, and caused your stock market to move to record levels over 100 times, positively impacting the retirements of tens of millions of citizens.
特朗普降低了您的稅率，將已婚人士合拼報稅的標準最低免稅額由12,500美元提高到了24,400美元，他的經濟政策也導致美國的股市上升至創紀錄高點超過100次，對數千萬退休的美國人產生了積極性的影響。
The clown in the White House rebuilt our military which the Obama administration had crippled and had fired 214 key generals and admirals in his first year of office.
奧巴馬政府時期基本上已經癱瘓了美國的軍隊，在他任內第一年總共解雇了214名主要將軍和海軍上將。但是特朗普加撥資源重建了我們的軍隊！
This clown in the White House uncovered widespread pedophilia in the government and in Hollywood, and is exposing worldwide sex trafficking of minors and bringing children home to their families.
特朗普在政府和荷里活發現了廣泛的戀童癖罪行，同時揭露世界各地的雛妓販運問題非常嚴重，並設法拯救這些受害兒童送回家中。
The clown in the White House works for free and has lost well over 2 billion dollars of his own money in serving - and done all of this and much more in the face of relentless undermining and opposition from people who are threatened because they know they are going to be exposed as the criminals that they are if he is re-elected.
他每月自願將總統薪酬全數捐出。他這份無償工作已經令他自己損失了超過20億美元。他卻要面對各方無情的破壞和反對。很多人都害怕如果特朗普再次當選，他們的罪行將被揭露並成為罪犯。
Oh, this clown also signed the followings:
特朗普還簽名了以下內容：
- Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Act of 2019 (HKHRDA)
- 2019年《香港人權與民主法》（HKHRDA）
- A bill to prohibit the commercial export of covered munitions items to the Hong Kong Police Force
- 一項禁止商業途徑將槍械用彈藥出口到香港警察部隊的法案
- Hong Kong Autonomy Act
- 香港自治法
- Executive Order 13936
- 行政命令13936
- Uyghur Human Rights Policy Act
- 維吾爾人權政策

I got it, you don't like him. Many of you utterly hate and despise him. How special of you. He is serving you and ALL the American people. What are you doing besides calling him names and laughing about him catching the China virus ?????
我明白了，你不喜歡他。 你們許多人完全討厭和鄙視他。 這樣你覺得自己特別? 他為你和所有美國人服務。 除了叫他的名字，嘲笑他感染中國病毒之外，你還做什麼？
And please educate me again as to what Biden has accomplished for America in his 47 years in office?
再者，你能否告訴我關於拜登，他在美國任職47年中為美國取得什麼成就嗎？
I’ll take a ‘clown’ any day versus a fork-tongued, smooth-talking hypocritical corrupt liar. Please let it be known, I am not sure I would want to have a beer with him (if he drank, which he doesn't) or even be his friend. I don’t care if I even like him. I want a strong leader who isn’t afraid to kick some ass when needed. I don’t need a fatherly figure - I don’t need a liar - that's what Hollywood and CNN, MSNBC, ABC, NBC, CBS, and the New York Times are for.
有人叫特朗普做“白宮的小丑”。我寧可要一個“小丑”，也不要一堆說話流暢，虛偽的腐敗騙子。 我不確定我是否想與特朗普喝杯啤酒（若果他喝的話，事實他是滴酒不沾）或者成為他的朋友。 我根本不在乎是否喜歡他，我只想要一個強大的領導者，在有需要時並不懼怕與邪惡對抗。我不需要那種好萊塢，CNN，MSNBC，ABC，NBC，CBS和《紐約時報》等等所設定的父親形象似的騙子！
I don’t need someone to help me, but I also don’t want an obstacle or a demented, senile washed-up Swamp Monster.
我不需要有人來幫助我，同樣，我也不需要任何障礙或，既衰老又癡呆的沼澤怪物。
God bless Donald Trump - the most unappreciated President in history.
願上帝保佑唐納德·特朗普-歷史上最不被讚賞的總統。
